products.name: Men's Training Tee
products.desc: Breathable performance tee cut for training.
products.desc_sr: Prozračna majica visokih performansi, krojena za trening.

products.name: Men's Training Shorts
products.desc: Squat-proof shorts with a secure zip pocket.
products.desc_sr: Šorc otporan na čučnjeve, sa sigurnim džepom na zip.

products.name: Men's Training Tank
products.desc: Dropped-armhole tank for full range of motion.
products.desc_sr: Majica bez rukava sa spuštenim otvorom za ruke, za pun opseg pokreta.

products.name: Women's Training Tee
products.desc: Fitted performance tee cut for training.
products.desc_sr: Uska majica visokih performansi, krojena za trening.

products.name: Women's Leggings
products.desc_sr: Helanke visokog struka, otporne na čučnjeve.

products.name: VALENS Socks
products.desc: Cushioned crew socks with arch support.
products.desc_sr: Amortizovane čarape srednje visine sa podrškom za svod stopala.

products.name: Lifting Straps
products.desc: Cotton lifting straps for heavy pulls.
products.desc_sr: Pamučne trake za dizanje, za teška povlačenja.

products.name: Wrist Wraps
products.desc: Stiff wrist wraps for pressing support.
products.desc_sr: Čvrsti steznici za ručne zglobove, podrška pri potiskivanju.

products.name: Cable Cuff Straps
products.desc: Padded ankle cuffs for cable work.
products.desc_sr: Podstavljene manžetne za gležnjeve za vežbanje sa sajlom.

products.name: Knee Sleeves
products.desc_sr: Steznici za kolena od 7mm, za čučnjeve.

products.name: Elbow Sleeves
products.desc_sr: Kompresioni steznici za laktove, za potiskivanje.

products.name: Shaker Bottle
products.desc: 700ml leak-proof shaker with the VALENS mark.
products.desc_sr: Nepropusni šejker od 700ml sa VALENS oznakom.
